g.text: Phase 1–2: Context Scan, Persona Selection & Independent Review
Phase 3–4: Adversarial Debate — reviewers challenge each other with source evidence
will leak class imbalance into validation.
the raw ingest path is unprotected.
Phase 5–6: Blind Scoring, Audit, Supreme Judge Verdict & Structured Report — all while you sleep
every finding gets an epistemic label

svg.text: agent-review-panel — multi-agent adversarial review for Claude Code
